# Guelph Plumber — Plumbing Leads, Guelph, Ontario

> Connects Guelph, Ontario homeowners needing drain cleaning, water heater service, leak repair, or bathroom/kitchen plumbing with a single vetted, exclusive local licensed plumber. Part of the WeProvideLeads network of local-service lead generation sites serving Guelph, Ontario, Canada.

This site is a lead-generation and referral service, not a plumbing company itself. Requests submitted through the contact form are matched with one qualified, exclusive licensed plumber serving the area. Fully licensed under the Ontario College of Trades; permits pulled where required; 24/7 emergency plumbing response.

## Services
- Drain Cleaning
- Water Heater Service (tank and tankless)
- Leak Repair
- Bathroom Plumbing
- Kitchen Plumbing
- Emergency Plumbing

## Service area
Guelph, Fergus, Elora, Rockwood, Erin, Acton, Puslinch, Cambridge, Wellington County
